title: What a godly man chases (it's not her)
caption:
The guy desperate for a girlfriend reeks of it — and she can tell.

Not because he's bad. Because he's been chasing the wrong thing, and his whole posture gives it away. Head up, scanning the room, hoping she makes him feel complete.

A man walking with God doesn't look like that. He's not less interested — he's just not anxious. He's building something that matters, and a woman becomes part of the story, not the point of it.

"Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4. That's not a trick for getting a girlfriend. It's a description of a man whose anchor is in the right place.

Chase the right thing first. Everything else follows.

—

Save this for the brother who's making every decision with the wrong compass.

#faith #godlymen #christianmen #relationships #manofgod #purity #disciplineequalsfreedom #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
